nodes.title: Understanding Fishing Basics
nodes.rationale: To relax by the water with fishing, a beginner needs to understand the fundamental concepts of fishing, including basic gear and fish behavior. This foundation will prevent frustration and allow for a more enjoyable experience.
suggested_micro_topics: Types of fishing (e.g., bait fishing, lure fishing)
Basic fishing gear (rod, reel, line, hooks, sinkers, bobbers)
Understanding common freshwater fish (e.g., sunfish, perch)
Basic fish behavior and feeding patterns
Safety considerations near water

nodes.title: Selecting and Setting Up Gear
nodes.rationale: Properly selecting and setting up fishing gear is crucial for a beginner to have a successful and relaxing experience. Ill-suited or incorrectly assembled gear can lead to tangles, lost fish, and overall frustration.
suggested_micro_topics: Choosing a beginner-friendly rod and reel combo
Spooling fishing line
Tying basic fishing knots (e.g., clinch knot, palomar knot)
Attaching hooks, sinkers, and bobbers
Selecting appropriate bait or lures for target fish

nodes.title: Finding and Approaching Fishing Spots
nodes.rationale: Knowing where to fish and how to approach a spot without disturbing the fish is essential for a relaxing and productive outing. This module focuses on practical location skills.
suggested_micro_topics: Identifying promising fishing locations (e.g., near structures, weed beds)
Understanding local fishing regulations and licenses
stealthy approach to avoid scaring fish
Reading the water for signs of fish activity
Considering accessibility and comfort of fishing spots

nodes.title: Casting and Retrieving Techniques
nodes.rationale: Mastering basic casting and retrieving techniques allows a beginner to effectively present their bait or lure, increasing their chances of catching fish and making the process more engaging and less frustrating.
suggested_micro_topics: Basic overhead casting
Underhand casting for accuracy
Varying retrieval speeds and patterns
Detecting bites and setting the hook
Practicing casting in open areas

nodes.title: Handling and Releasing Fish
nodes.rationale: Learning how to properly handle and release fish is important for ethical fishing practices and ensures the well-being of the fish, contributing to a sustainable and enjoyable hobby.
suggested_micro_topics: Safe handling of fish (e.g., wet hands, supporting body)
Removing hooks safely
Understanding catch and release principles
Minimizing stress on the fish
Photography tips for fish (optional)

nodes.title: Fishing for Relaxation Mindset
nodes.rationale: Since the user's goal is to relax, this module focuses on cultivating a mindful approach to fishing, emphasizing patience, observation, and enjoying the natural surroundings.
suggested_micro_topics: Patience and observation in fishing
Connecting with nature during fishing
Mindfulness techniques while by the water
Enjoying the process over the catch
Dealing with slow fishing days

nodes.title: Beginner Fishing Podcasts
nodes.rationale: To address the user's desire for podcasts, this module provides resources for listening to fishing-related content, offering an alternative and convenient way to learn and relax.
suggested_micro_topics: Identifying beginner-friendly fishing podcasts
Topics covered in popular fishing podcasts (e.g., gear reviews, fishing stories)
How podcasts can enhance the fishing experience
Finding podcasts focused on relaxation and nature
Using podcasts for continued learning and inspiration
